kirundi.claim_daily_essence_bonus: Fata Impano y’Intango ya buri munsi
kirundi.essence_scales_with_how_many_source_to: Intango yiyongera hakurikijwe umubare w’ibikoresho-nkomoko wamenyerejeho.
kirundi.sage_spells_unlock_when_you_make_progr: Amarozi y’Umunyabwenge afungurwa iyo utera imbere mu bindi bikoresho bya STEM Lab — Umushakashatsi w’ikirere, Laboratwari y’Imibare, RoadReady n’ibindi. Buri rozi ni ubushobozi bwo kwimenyereza-kwibuka — uritangaza usubiza ikibazo giturutse mu rwego rw’icyo gikoresho.
kirundi.scroll_down_to_yet_to_discover_and_cli: Manuka ugere kuri «Bitaravumburwa» hanyuma ukande buto
kirundi.button_that_ll_take_you_to_the_tool_th: ya rozi iyo ari yo yose. Izakujyana ku gikoresho kiyifungura.
kirundi.allobot_is_watching_your_progress_ever: AlloBot areba iterambere ryawe hose. Ubutumwa, ikibazo canke imyitozo imwe mu kindi gikoresho bizatangira gufungura amarozi hano.
kirundi.open_study_hall_untimed_practice_mode: Fungura Icumba cyo Kwiga — uburyo bwo kwimenyereza butagira igihe
kirundi.untimed_drill_no_damage_full_explanati: Imyitozo itagira igihe · Nta kwangirika · Ibisobanuro byuzuye
kirundi.ai_scaffolds_while_learner_does_most_o: AI itanga inkunga mu gihe umwigeme akora imirimo myinshi yo gutekereza. Kwiga nyakuri + umutekano ushyize mu gaciro.
kirundi.real_learning_happens_with_ai_assist_t: Kwiga nyakuri kubaho hifashishijwe AI. Kuguranana bishyizwe mu gaciro.
kirundi.some_learning_some_risk_watch_for_over: Kwiga gato, ingaruka gato. Witondere kwishingikiriza cane buhoro buhoro.
kirundi.high_error_cost_low_learner_effort_ai_: Ikiguzi cy’ikosa kinini + imbaraga z’umwigeme nkeya + AI mu ruziga = ibisubizo bigaragara neza ariko bidakomeza mu bikorwa.
kirundi.ai_doing_all_the_work_learner_gets_ans: AI ikora imirimo yose. Umwigeme abona ibisubizo ariko ntabwo asobanukiwe. Ubuhanga bugabanuka canke ntibukure na rimwe.
kirundi.ai_workload_inquiry_who_is_doing_the_t: 🔬 Iperereza ku Mutwaro w’Akazi wa AI — Ninde utekereza?
kirundi.set_ai_assistance_level_learner_effort: Shyiraho urwego rw’inkunga ya AI, imbaraga z’umwigeme, ubushya bw’umurimo n’ikiguzi cy’ikosa. Gereranya imiterere yo kwiga. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_when_does_ai_assist_he: Igitekerezo cyawe (Ni ryari inkunga ya AI ifasha aho kwangiza? Umurongo wawushyira he?)
kirundi.e_g_on_high_novelty_tasks_ai_is_a_brai: urugero, ku mirimo mishya AI ni umufatanyabikorwa wo gutekereza; ku murimo usanzwe ihagarika ubuhanga...
kirundi.ai_assist_learner_effort_sums_to_100_w: Inkunga ya AI + imbaraga z’umwigeme byose > 100 — inkunga irenze ikora iki ku nyungu yo kwiga?
kirundi.why_does_novelty_matter_for_both_learn: Kuki ubushya ari ingenzi ku kwiga n’ingaruka byombi?
kirundi.when_is_ai_doing_90_of_the_work_actual: Ni ryari AI ikora 90% by’umurimo ari icyemezo cyiza koko? (Inyibutso: ikiguzi cy’ikosa gito, ubushya buke, umusaruro ufite igitutu cy’igihe.)
kirundi.how_would_you_design_a_class_where_ai_: Wateganya ute ishuri aho AI yemewe ariko kwiga kudahagarara?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_ai_effort_novel: Nshobora gusobanura impamvu iyi vanga ya AI/imbaraga/ubushya/ikiguzi itanga iyi miterere.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Igikoresho cy’iperereza — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gisubizo gitangwa. «Inyungu yo kwiga» ni igereranyo; gupima nyakuri bisaba isuzuma mbere/nyuma, imirimo yo kwimura n’ibizamini byo kubika. Ingaruka z’inkunga ya AI zitandukana bitewe n’urwego (guhanga vs ikoranabuhanga vs kwitekerezaho).
kirundi.equip_up_to_3_spells_you_can_only_cast: Tegura kugeza kuri amarozi 3. Muri uru rugendo ushobora gutangaza gusa amarozi wateguye.
kirundi.pick_what_fits_today_you_can_change_th: Hitamo ibikwiye uyu munsi. Ushobora guhindura ibi mu rugendo urwo ari rwo rwose. Ubukana bwinshi = impano nini y’intango.
kirundi.no_presets_yet_build_a_loadout_you_lik: Nta teguro rirahari. Ubaka ibikoresho ukunda, hanyuma ukande «Bika iyi ubu» kugira ubibike ubutaha.
kirundi.static_questions_never_run_out_gemini_: Ibibazo bihamye ntibishira na rimwe — Gemini ikora bishya ako kanya.
kirundi.ai_generated_questions_can_be_wrong_ev: ⚠️ Ibibazo AI yakoze bishobora kuba bitari byo (ndetse n’igisubizo cyanditsweho) — niba hari ikigaragara nabi bwira mwarimu wawe.
kirundi.research_specific_goals_improve_perfor: Ubushakashatsi: intego zihariye zizamura imikorere + kwibanda. Hitamo iyo ari yo yose.
kirundi.rewards_versatility_not_one_trick: Iha igihembo ubushobozi bwinshi, atari uburyo bumwe
kirundi.rewards_strategy_healing_choices: Iha igihembo ingamba + amahitamo yo gukira
kirundi.crit_during_the_winding_phase: Kora iby’ingenzi mu gihe cyo kwitegura
kirundi.land_a_critical_cast_correct_under_6_s: Gera ku irozi ry’ingenzi (byo + munsi y’amasegonda 6) kugira uhagarike unagabanye ukwangirika.
kirundi.calibrated_you_said_you_knew_it_and_yo: 🎯 Byahujwe: wavuze ko ubizi — kandi wari ubizi.
kirundi.overconfident_felt_sure_but_missed_wor: ⚠ Kwiyizera birenze: wumvise ushize amakenga ariko wabuze. Bikwiye kurebwa ubwa kabiri mu Cyumba cyo Kwiga.
kirundi.lucky_guess_but_maybe_you_knew_more_th: 🎁 Ukwibwira kw’amahirwe — ariko wenda wari uzi byinshi kurusha uko watekereje!
kirundi.self_aware_you_flagged_the_doubt_and_t: 🎯 Kwimenya: waranze ugushidikanya, kandi ugushidikanya kwari ukuri. Ongera ku isubiramo.
kirundi.ai_generated_question_the_marked_answe: Ikibazo AI yakoze — igisubizo cyanditsweho gishobora kuba kitari cyo. Niba kigaragara nabi bwira mwarimu.
kirundi.this_run_per_spell_breakdown: 🔍 Iri siganwa — isesengura kuri buri rozi
kirundi.accuracy_by_stated_confidence_well_cal: Ukuri hakurikijwe kwiyizera kwavuzwe; imirongo ihujwe neza izamuka kuva «kwibwira» kugeza «nari mbizi».
kirundi.re_study_what_you_got_wrong_mark_got_i: Ongera wige ibyo wibeshyeho. Iyo ubyumvise shyiraho «Nabyumvise ubu».
kirundi.what_is_one_thing_you_learned_or_notic: Ni ikihe kintu kimwe wize canke wabonye muri iri siganwa? (Kwandika bikomeza kwibuka kurusha gutekereza.)
kirundi.e_g_the_bee_flower_question_keeps_trip: urugero, «Ikibazo cy’uruyuki/indabyo kikomeza kunyobera — ubufatanye = bombi barungukira»
kirundi.spend_essence_to_deepen_the_runes_of_e: Koresha intango kugira wimbike ibimenyetso bya buri rozi. Urwego ruhanitse = ukwangirika kw’ibanze kwinshi + ibitero binini by’ingenzi.
kirundi.no_spells_to_upgrade_yet_unlock_spells: Nta marozi yo kuvugurura arahari. Fungura amarozi ukina ibindi bikoresho bya STEM Lab.
kirundi.untimed_practice_no_hp_no_damage_just_: Imyitozo itagira igihe. Nta HP. Nta kwangirika. Kwibuka + ibisobanuro gusa. Ibibazo wibeshyeho bigaruka vuba.
kirundi.no_spells_unlocked_yet_play_other_stem: Nta rozi irafungurwa. Kina ibindi bikoresho bya STEM Lab kugira ufungure amarozi, hanyuma ugaruke hano kwimenyereza.
kirundi.no_questions_in_the_review_queue_eithe: Nta bibazo mu murongo w’isubiramo. Canke ntabwo wakinnye bihagije canke uri gukora neza cane. Gerageza Icumba cyo Kwiga kwimenyereza gufite ingaruka nkeya canke utangire urugendo.
kirundi.question: ❓ Ikibazo
kirundi.cast_each_spell_at_least_3_times_to_se: Tangaza buri rozi nibura inshuro 3 kugira urebe imbaraga zawe nziza.
kirundi.no_weak_spots_flagged_yet_keep_casting: Nta hantu hadakomeye haramenyekana. Komeza gutangaza!
kirundi.when_you_say_you_know_it_and_you_do_th: Iyo uvuze «ndabizi» kandi koko ubizi — icyo ni ukuguza. Kudahuza (kwiyizera birenze/bike) ni ikiguzi gihishwe cyo kwiga.
kirundi.no_reflections_saved_yet_after_each_ex: Nta kwitekerezaho kurabikwa. Nyuma ya buri rugendo andika ikintu kimwe wabonye canke wize. Wowe w’ejo hazaza uzagushimira wowe w’ubu.
